title: Time Stopper
description: ⏱️ Ultimate Time Freeze - Stop everything mid-air! Arrows, TNT, players, mobs - all frozen!
body:
# ⏱️ TimeStop

**"Za Warudo! Toki wo Tomare!"**

Stop time and freeze the entire world! Inspired by DIO's Stand ability from JoJo's Bizarre Adventure.

---

## ⏱️ What Does It Do?

TimeStop adds a **legendary Clock item** to your server. When right-clicked, **EVERYTHING freezes** except the user:

- 👥 Players freeze mid-air
- 🏹 Arrows stop mid-flight
- 💥 TNT pauses before explosion
- 🧟 Mobs completely freeze
- 📦 Dropped items hang in air

After the duration ends, **everything resumes** from exactly where it was!

---

## ✨ Features

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| ⏸️ Complete Freeze | Like `/tick freeze` command |
| 🪂 Mid-Air Freeze | Players stay exactly where they are |
| 🏹 Projectile Freeze | Arrows, tridents freeze mid-flight |
| 💥 TNT Freeze | TNT won't explode during freeze |
| 📦 Item Freeze | Throw items and watch them hang in air |
| ⚔️ Combat Ready | User can attack frozen players |
| 🔄 Velocity Restore | Everything continues its path after resume |
| 🎯 One Item Only | Only ONE can exist on entire server |
| ⏰ Configurable | Set duration and cooldown |
| 💾 Persistent | Cooldown saves through restarts |

---

## 🎬 How It Works

1. Admin gives Time Stop item: `/timestop give <player>`
2. Player right-clicks the magical clock
3. **⏱️ TIME STOPS!**
4. Everyone freezes (even mid-jump!)
5. User moves freely for 20 seconds
6. User can:
   - Attack frozen players
   - Shoot arrows (they freeze mid-air!)
   - Throw items (they freeze mid-air!)
7. **⏱️ TIME RESUMES!**
8. Everything continues moving
9. 1 hour cooldown starts

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/timestop give <player>` | Give Time Stop item | `timestop.admin` |
| `/timestop cooldown` | Check cooldown status | None |
| `/timestop resetcooldown` | Reset cooldown | `timestop.admin` |
| `/timestop reload` | Reload config | `timestop.admin` |

**Aliases:** `/ts`, `/zawarudo`

---

## 🔑 Permissions

| Permission | Description | Default |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| `timestop.admin` | All admin commands | OP |

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

```yaml
# Time stop duration (seconds)
freeze-duration: 20

# Cooldown time (hours)
cooldown-hours: 1
